headline: 3 Financials Stocks with Exciting Potential
summary: Financial providers use their expertise in capital allocation and risk assessment to help facilitate economic growth while offering consumers and businesses essential financial services. But uncertainty about fiscal and monetary policy has tempered enthusiasm, and over the past six months, the industry has pulled back by 11.4%. This drop was worse than the S&P 500’s 4.8% fall.

headline: Credit card APRs have an 'economically meaningful' impact on consumer spending, Boston Fed finds
summary: When credit card rates go up, borrowers spend less on plastic, according to a research paper by the Federal Reserve Bank of Boston.
